channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: WHAT THE FUCK IS HAPPENING — 25 replies — 100.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
WHAT THE FUCK IS HAPPENING

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-03-13 04:04 UTC

OP

YOU FUCKING NIGGERS I'M GONNA GET RUINED

Early replies (first 3)

61976923
>>61976906
I promise you, dear Bobo, nothing ever happens.

61976931
>>61976906
my pp is hard

61976942
THIS IS BLANTANT MARKET MANIPULATION. THIS IS DISGUSTING. DISGUSTING BLATANT MANIPULATION.

FUCKKKKKKKKKKKKKK

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61976958
>>61976906
You should have shorted the stock market. BTC is being used by Iran to tranfer money without jewish interference.

61976980
>>61976942
I told you the other day. Why did you believe it was going down?

61976984
TOP IS IN BULL NIGGERS

61976988
Sorry, Bobo. Sorry that you didn't listen.

61977023
>>61976980
BECAUSE IT DOESN'T MAKE ANY FUCKING SENSE. IRAN IS WINNING. AND THEY'RE NOT GONNA SURRENDER. INFLATION IS GONNA HIT THE ENTIRE WORLD SO HARD THAT IT MIGHT TAKE US MANY YEARS TO RECOVER.

THIS IS BLATANT MARKET MANIPULATION. AMERICANS AND THAT JEWISH AMERICAN DEMON HOMOSEXUAL BESSENT IS MANIPULATING EVERYTHING SO HARD AND SO BLATANTLY IT FILLS ME WITH RAGE!!!!

61977061
Bullfags don't even have a reason for it to be pumping....
>Sustainable Pump.
>Source? Trust me bro.

61977066
>>61977061
It's just market manipulation. Pure war against humanity.

61977075
>>61977061
bitcoin desires to go up. what other reason does it need?

61977104
>>61977061
You've got the narrative backwards. There's literally no reason at all for the price to go down. But there's a ton of reasons for it to go up.

61977124
>>61976906
One more small pump and my net worth will be above $2 million again. GLORIOUS

61977182
>>61976906
Put everything on oil.

61977187
>>61977182

Fuck oil, faggot.

61977189
>>61977066
Checked. And that war is ever ongoing since our species exists. It will not be over soon.
Fuck the middle east by the way. Why would we even care?
It needs to be rubbed in these niggers faces that we do NOT NEED them.

61977200
>>61976906
tf are you complaining about you bobonigger? Everything is in the red but shitcoins who are micropenis greencandling.

61977253
>>61977182
oil is fucking rugging

61977266
>>61977253
From $98 to $96? Yeah bro what a rug

61977274
>>61977200
>Everything is in the red but shitcoins who are micropenis greencandling.

exactly. Bitcoin should be getting fucked right now as it waterfalls to $42k.

61977283
>>61977023
Are you Hasan Piker?

61977351
never bet agaist bitcoin lmao. i thought this was evident 10 years ago.

61977401
>>61977351

What are people even trying to trade on?

> they learn more about Bitcoin and why they don't have enough

Everything else is just gambling.

61977435
>>61977351
Yeah, it's not like it dumps 80% every 4 years

item.title: Honda flags first annual loss, hit by $15.7 billion EV charge — 14 replies — 48.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Honda flags first annual loss, hit by $15.7 billion EV charge

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-03-13 03:50 UTC

OP

>Trump ended subsidies, so Honda had to cancel EV models in the US market because Americans don't buy EVs
>Elsewhere, they can't compete with Chinese brands
https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/honda-expects-fy202526-loss-up-43-bln-review-ev-strategy-2026-03-12/
>Now Honda and other Japanese brands are focusing on India hoping that Indians will buy their EVs
Will this strategy work?

Early replies (first 3)

61975036
According to India Data Map, the current average Indian salary is equivalent to $337 per week or $4,044 per year

am I missing something here?

61975083
>>61975015
Maybe they'll learn that EVs are a meme and the only reason people buy one is because they fell for state sponsored propaganda.

61975129
>>61975083
are they a meme tho? prob more like most car makers simply joined way too late and now ching chong's build super cheap shit in an economy where most people can afford less and less

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61975173
>>61975129
>heavier
>more complicated design
>more complicated maintenance and repair
Yeah they're a meme
The only reason they took off is because automakers killed their own golden goose turning a car into a drivable computer
If basic, easy to manufacture and repair, cars were allowed to be sold in this pseudocommie market, EV's would disappear, minus niche use ones like urban delivery vans

61975212
>>61975173
Electric motors are significantly simpler than internal combustion ones thoughbeit

61975465
>>61975212
True, but I also left out the necessity of more exotic minerals needed for the power storage systems. That may one day get solved, but today is not that day

61975494
>>61975015

They can barely use toilets

61975564
>>61975015
How can street shitters that throw shit at each other all day going to buy their cars.

61975621
>>61975015
>Japanese made the fatal error of assuming Poos are human
Chinks win again

61975670
>>61975015
Capilism is so fake bro I spent so many hours of my life defending a system that never even existed

61975826
>>61975212
in like 2004 me and my retard friends rebuilt my 200sx engine (blown head gasket, pulled the whole engine) and my friend's turbo Ford probe (he boosted the psi and fucked something up) using nothing but the paper manuals i think they were haynes or something. we were all 16 or 17. idiot hillbillies with hand tools can rip apart and repair tractor engines. ICE engines are easy once you get over intimidation for how heavy some parts are and if you have the right tools to lift them

61977295
>>61975129
Chyna is just gov subsidizing ev mfgs, those loose money on every single car but Chyna declared was on auto industry...

61977384
>>61975036
337*52=17,524, so yes you've definitely missed something.

61977406
>>61975015
Mr. Honda, sir... would you please bring back the cbr1100xx. Thank you sir.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 50 replies — 43.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-03-13 02:59 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61951573
>>61951499
very good....i hope 3$ in april
75 in 2 year

61951605
>>61951573
75 cents

61956435
https://polkadothalving.com/ 4 more days

61959501
100$ end of bull run

61960135
>>61956435
>>61959501

All the oilfags and metalfags are missing easy money here

61962610
https://polkadothalving.com/ 3 more days

61962631
>>61942667
I did some research and boughted, fren

61962633
>>61962631
Oh? What convinced you?

61962637
>>61962631
Also, 1 recommendation. Stake on Bifrost or Hydration. Or through the official staking dashboard https://staking.polkadot.cloud/#/overview. Don't use exchanges, they give you peanuts.

61962645
https://x.com/21shares_us/status/2031028768001704295
"
$TDOT is the first-ever @Polkadot
ETP in the US, now live and #NasdaqListed.
"

https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2031281093635129822
"
It’s official.
The first Polkadot U.S. ETF is live and trading on Nasdaq.
"

picrel

61962682
>>61962633
DOT IS GOING TO THE MOON

61962686
https://www.21shares.com/en-us/products-us/tdot 11.3m$ of inflows in the first day. They're also considering staking at some point.

>>61962682
You earlier said "I did some research and boughted". What were your findings? What convinced you?

61962688
>>61962682
>DOT IS GOING TO THE MOON
100$ end of bull run

61962693
https://ng.investing.com/etfs/tdot-nasdaq

61962715
i dont sell, i dont care

61962726
>>61962715
>i dont sell, i dont care
I DOT buy, I DOT care

61965530
DOT? That thing is put into my brakes?

61966637
back to $1?

61968186
>>61966637
>I DOT buy, I DOT care
>i don't sell, i don't care

61968274
This crypto is 1.50.
The fuck?

Not a stock!

61971016
https://polkadothalving.com/ 2 more days

61971138
Prepare yourselves guys. A once in a lifetime event is about to happen. The millennial lunar eclipse is about to happen.

61972032
>>61971138
Locked and loaded fellow DOThead

61972844
>>61932834
This is the pedochain and the total ruin of investors. This crap is just going to go lower, all the way to zero.

61975396
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2031796064085242150
"
Ongoing economic upgrade for Polkadot introduces DOT scarcity in 3 days.

The first Polkadot Halving will deliver a daily reduction of issuance by 53%:
• Maximum supply: 2.1B DOT
• Reduced long-term inflation
• A more predictable monetary model
"

I just hope you guys understand that even though the inflation is dropping that this WILL NOT have an immediate effect. Stuff takes time. If you believe that the price will sky rocket after the inflation drop then you're in for a disappointing experience.

61976472
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9jK-NcRmVcw
https://polkadothalving.com/ 1 more day

61976836
>>61975396
Maybe you should have mentioned this beforehand

61977306
staking like 650 dot on kraken

item.title: Its beyond over for USA, the pool is closed and now the global empire will collapse — 25 replies — 26.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Its beyond over for USA, the pool is closed and now the global empire will collapse

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-03-13 03:12 UTC

OP

Its beyond over for USA, the pool is closed and now the global empire will collapse

Early replies (first 3)

61972232
if destroying america is that easy why didn't Iran do this earlier?

61972240
>>61972232
Iran was unironically trying to be the bigger man and not descend into this barbarity, it took blackmailed pedo Trump to reach this point

61972245
>>61972232
because other countries are ruled by adults
your poor third world muttland could learn a thing or two
t. European

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61972277
>>61972240
"being the bigger man" would involve negotiating instead of murdering your own population and subjecting them to an extended campaign you can't win

61972278
>>61972230

61972279
>>61972277
>Killing their own people

some countries care about the rule of law

61972284
>>61972279
>simping for shariah law
retarded

61972292
>>61972277
You don't negotiate with terrorists

61972360
>>61972292
Then whys trump talking to them asking them to surrender and shit? Is he stupid?

61972366
>>61972240
This. Precisely this.

61972370
>>61972277
Post your keyboard right now.
>it's the Hebrew/English keyboard

61972372
>>61972360
Trump is the terrorist

61972389
>>61972277
this is a bloodthirsty israeli kike

61972577
>>61972232
if they did it for no reason there would be a coalition of everybody against them. Even China, an apparently Communist state is apprehensive about this.

61973019
>>61972277
>murdering your own population
Source? We have more videos of American cops executing civilians (2) than iranains doing the same (0)

61973029
>>61972577
That's hardly surprising Americans especially their diplomats were shitting themselves when the French revolution kicked off too.

61973034
It would be so funny if China gave Iran long range missiles and Iran bombed Taiwan for them

61973142
>>61972277
>subjecting them to an extended campaign you can't win
day 12 of the 3 day special operation

61973147
>>61973019
Source? Are you a mudslime shit skin? I’ve literally talked to people who live in Iran. Also, Iran shut down their internet so it’s very hard for info to get out. You stupid nigger.

61973461
>>61972230
It might unironically be true.

A hydrocarbon supply shock might create the required political impetus across the world to electrify and reduce dependence on hydrocarbons. Then the US' direct and indirect control over the supermajority of the world's hydrocarbon supply won't matter anymore. If the spice melange becomes obsolete, it weakens the empire.

The 1973 oil crisis led to the Messmer plan, Project Independence and Nixon's 1000-reactor plan. Modern technology means electrification has never been easier, and allows deep electrification to an extent that wasn't possible in the 1970s.

61973567
>>61973147
>I’ve literally talked to people who live in Iran
Yeah you talked to some 3rd generation immigrant don't lie to us

61976897
>>61972277
When you keep killing negotiators it prevents the continuation of negotiations. Americais larping like they one despite requiring the goods from nations running out of fuels. Have a nice war, the ride never ends.

61977280
>>61973461
Yeah but you're not factoring the fact that electricity and renewable and alterative energies is woke commie DEI gay trans BLM shit.

61977284
>>61976897
There will be no negotiations. That was already said. Stop simping for dictators, you brown piece of garbage.

61977326
>le pools closed xd
>american empire xd
RapeApe, why are you letting wumao leak out of your containment board? Take another bribe?

item.title: Is BTC just a store of value or more? — 47 replies — 23.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is BTC just a store of value or more?

Open thread • Replies: 47 • Updated: 2026-03-13 02:07 UTC

OP

People say BTC is boring since it’s not pumping. Is this all it’s gonna be or will it evolve further?

Early replies (first 3)

61967712
>>61964560
Bitcoin is dead

61967714
>>61967712
You mean crypto in general

61967717
>>61967712
So is Dawson

RIP

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61972505
>>61972466
Yeah no it isn't, try 25 cents you retards and the transaction will never go through on bitcoin. Lying pieces of shit can never show a transaction of something just five or ten dollars because you have to pay exorbitant fees to guarantee the transaction even goes through on time.

61972507
>>61964560
I was finally gonna buy some of this bitcoin stuff that my son has been telling me about for years but then I found out that it was created by Jeffery Epstein to fund human trafficking or something.
No thanks.
Anyway my focus is on the conflict in the Middle East now and watching the crude price.
Hopefully Trump and Israel can turn Iran into a big glass bowl.

61972529
>>61968612
>the greatest and best performing asset of all time!
Baby boomers bought 160 acres for $5,000 in the 1970s and later turned that land into gravel pits and made 1000x more than Bitcoin ever did. Literal sand has performed better than BTC but it doesn’t have a chart and it doesn’t capture attention.

61972588
>>61972505
Cope and seethe, you fudding faggot nigger.

61972599
>>61972529
bitcoin did a 700,000x in 17 years, meanwhile you made up grossly exaggerated numbers to try and make a point and you STILL couldn't create a scenario where it performed better than bitcoin, just think about that for a second, your made up fantasy world best case scenario where you find a bajillion acres of land for 2 cents STILL underperforms bitcoin

61972658
>>61972588
Lol exactly, you fucking Ponzi scheme kiketards can never show a real transaction but anyone who has owned bitcoin and tried to send ten dollars and realised that you have to spend a fucking fiver just to get the transaction to go through the network has quickly realised it will never be money. The amount of people who actually buy anything with crypto is tiny, it's either whales or people who bought so long ago that they can afford to lose some money on it.

Literally no one is using bitcoin as money, they're just holding it, shilling it to retards and then cashing out, which is nothing like money where you can make small daily transactions and use it in every day life. That's why no one even talks about spending money through bitcoin, they haven't even fucking tried to, they straight trade it for cash to profit on idiots, they never use it bitcoin to bitcoin because you make even bigger losses trying to gas your way through the network so your transaction fucking goes through. Lol for those who don't know, just buy a tiny bit of bitcoin and test it yourself, see for yourself retards.

61972666
>>61968612
>a github repo run by a couple dudes is the soundest money ever conceived

61972672
>>61972588
Just to add, so this faggot can cry about the truth, try buying some bitcoin and then making a transaction, try to pay the minimum and watch your transaction never go through and just fail. Looool, crypto is money? Then how can you fail a transaction? Just put the fucking gold in someone's hand and watch that transaction work, but bitchcoin? Lmao you can fail a transaction and it never goes through because you didn't pay five to ten percent or more of your transaction to the miners. It's pathetic. That's why these shills don't use it as money but they use it as a way to launder profits from the Ponzi scheme itself straight into dollars. Even bitchcoin owners don't want to keep their crypto, they want to hold until they sell for dollars lmao. Pathetic cult indoctrinated retards.

Crypto really is just an iq test in that they've sold it to idiots under the characteristics of gold and silver, except 'digital'. That's like me selling starving digital niggers some digital nft food, it's not even fucking real and they can't eat it. Hilarious. Literally crypto faggots are pure failures, because even if they make it big on crypto, one winner comes at the expense of thousands of losers, on top of which the win reinforces stupid beliefs that gets these retards to lose their money real quick just like lottery winners with poor spending habits and no monetary education.

61972680
>>61972672
your posts are always stupid

61972845
>>61967842
It’s already possible with Babylon anon. Go dig around yourself.

61972849
>>61967717
So sad

61972928
>>61972680
Awww not one single refutation because you lying little point scheme faggots have never even tried to spend your bitchcoin, you just hold it, in order to cash out when enough dumb fucking retards buy into your crypto ponzi scheme.

61972936
>>61972928
Nah, they probably don't even buy bitcoin, they just have some account with some exchange or hedge fund and simply trust that they are holding bitcoin on their behalf.

61972939
>>61972680
They think long answers are smart .

61972948
>>61972845
Defi is only on Ethereum I guess. Solana and sui are other options but not much liquidity

61972950
>>61964560
> a store of value
weird bait

61972957
>>61972948
when $10k for eth? Vitalik is always selling

61972973
>>61967721
Anon stuck in 2017 while devs are building ways for native BTC to be used in DeFi without intermediaries.

61973010
>>61972950
what's weird bait means?

61973013
>>61972973
btc is wrapped. Hard pass

61973015
>>61972666
so what do you want?

61974112
>>61967733
Just buy the dip if you want

61974187
>>61964560
Crypto is dead because nobody cares about it anymore, it is not needed for anything and people have shifted their attention to things they actually need

61975187
>>61972948
yeah ethereum has most liquidity for sure but btc’s catching up. it partnered with ledger, integration not live yet, users will soon be able to approve BTC vault transactions securely on-device and keep custody

61975192
>>61964560
BTC was almost double price a few months ago
Attention spans at an ATL

61975193
>>61972451
Then wait for it to dump. Anything can happen tho.

61975253
>>61973013
nah not wrapped if you take the time to look it up. it stays native and can actually be put to work instead of just sitting there

61975277
>>61967738
Anon, that’s literally the point. Bitcoin’s value isn’t backed by a company or government, it’s backed by people agreeing it’s scarce and useful. Digital receipts don’t matter, adoption and network effect do.

61977174
>>61967782
I guess you will stick to sending remittances lol

61977180
>>61967712
give me all 21 million of them

item.title: It's over. The US is collapsing. — 8 replies — 22.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
It's over. The US is collapsing.

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-03-13 03:46 UTC

OP

It's over. The US is collapsing.

Early replies (first 3)

61977357
>restrict the collapse

Get. Fucked. Brokie.

61977369
>>61977357
What happens when you hold bags for scams.
Who cares about fundamentals when like go up!

61977377
>>61977348
Oh shit, I need to check my Lehman Brothers portfolio.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61977379
>>61977348
>The US is collapsing, we're winning!!!
Okay, Iranian bot.

61977380
>>61977348
STOP THE REDEEMING

61977383
>>61977379
Cutting out inefficiencies out is part of a healthy economy. Bailouts just preserve the inevitable with unhealthy companies.

61977391
>>61977379
Cope

61977399
bros...but i thought the great american economy would never collapse again? where's the money printer? our masters demand it.

item.title: Day 1662 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M — 5 replies — 13.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Day 1662 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-03-13 03:46 UTC

OP

Day 1662 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Early replies (first 3)

61977222
bitcoin reaching 1 mil within a decade is honestly a conservative estimation. that shit's getting so scarce and there are no breaks on this train. volatility will dampen too so patience is the only winning strat.

61977235
>>61977222
But what if we... redistribute?

61977239
>>61977222
Magnificent trips

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61977388
>>61977222
> that shit's getting so scarce and there are no breaks on this train.

Scarcity != value retard.
You Mumus are so stupid its a wonder how you even solve the Captchas to make your dumbass post.

61977398
>>61977388
Hahahahaha just you wait another 1 year bearnegro

item.title: Is GLD still good to buy? I've been dca-ing for the past year every paycheck. Probably wouldn't sell for at least anothe… — 6 replies — 9.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is GLD still good to buy? I've been dca-ing for the past year every paycheck. Probably wouldn't sell for at least anothe…

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-03-13 03:28 UTC

OP

Is GLD still good to buy? I've been dca-ing for the past year every paycheck. Probably wouldn't sell for at least another year.

Early replies (first 3)

61974550
>>61974504
It's not going to be doing major 10x moves, gold is going to crab around within a 20% range for a few years and then start going towards 8-10k/oz by 2035.

It's already at the most extreme valuation relative to US house prices ever. One could argue that it still has room to go up because china caused the parabolic move this time, not the US. But that also means you risk is tied to chinese sentiment.

61974617
>>61974550
Would you suggest anything else? I'm just trying to outperform the sp500 with the best ROI I can.

I would think GLD still does well based on de-dollarization, inflation, and the failure of fiat currencies

61974675
>>61974504
yes

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61974742
>>61974617
>I'm just trying to outperform the sp500 with the best ROI I can

If that's your criteria then all you have to do is nothing, the S&P isn't going anywhere but down from here. It hasn't gone up in like 5 months now with some of the biggest sectors selling off and money just rotating around.

Alot of people are expecting a drop to the liberation tariff low and then a bump to put in the biggest head and shoulders pattern in history before crashing to zero when the boomers start to panic sell.

The government will be printing infinitytrillion dollars over the next decade to pay for the retired boomers, buy gold if you want to preserve your current wealth.

61974795
>>61974742
Yeah, I still keep my 401k for it, but anything in my brokerage I'm trying out outperform it and SGOV. So far, so good. Any thoughts on BTC? Probably will dca under 50k

61977355
>>61974675
why?

item.title: FUCK THIS WAR — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
FUCK THIS WAR

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-03-13 04:04 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61977431
>>61977427
17 buc-ees sammiches.
Slow down fat boy.

61977434
>>61977427
you can call your congressman (don't write/email them, they don't care about that), and ask them to vote no on the upcoming funding bill for the war.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are… — 232 replies — 51.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are…

Open thread • Replies: 232 • Updated: 2026-03-12 23:37 UTC

OP

Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said
>what do you do to make $125k
>that is a lot
>are you in LA?
>why are you lying?
Then I said
>150k is middle class
>no offense, when others don’t believe others, it means they are poor or make less
Then he replied
>150k is not middle class
>60k-80k is middle class
I said
>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
Then he starts lying and saying he is 13
The conversation is just him seething someone makes $125k and arguing that 150k is not middle class.
I tell him due to increased cost of living and wealth gap, even 1m is nothing and 10% of 50% of the consumption and 90% are not doing well.
Why are poor people always seething?
$125k isn’t even middle class. How poor do you guys that guy is? 40k? 70k?
He was really defensive about $150k being middle class.
Do poor people think they are middle class?
This isn’t the first time this has happened.

Early replies (first 3)

61965995
>>61965964
Middle class is self sufficient, it requires an income that can support a household, retirement, children, education(including college), stay at home wife (or) nanny, 2+ modern cars, insurance, 1-3 vacations/yr . I would say 125k-250k depending on area. Lower class normies think they are middle class, middle class is mostly dead. Upper class has excess income after meeting those needs. Lower class requires gov assistance(welfare, healthcare, public school, etc).

61966005
>>61965964
>>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
When people ssay middle class they mean they've got a wife and together they make about 140k or something and can easily afford a suburban house in areas within 2 hours of major cities, especially in southern and midwestern cities like Omaha and Dallas. Your idea of middle class is jetsetting around and banging sloots whenever you want.

61966016
>>61965995
> 1-3 vacations/yr .
1 vacation, maybe dude.
3? Lmao.
I think middle class lifestyle now requires a lot higher income than what people think now.
That wasn’t the first time someone got really defensive with “no, 60-80k is middle class.”
Fucking annoying but good conversation I guess. The ignorance is annoying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61972540
>>61967215
They live low class lives full of comforts. Better than peasants 100s years ago who has to farm and toil.

61972601
>>61971594
>bourgeoisie who have fuck you levels of money & power.

More like lazy parasites who were born into lazy larasitic bloodlines that control the government.

That's the highest level of wealth.
All should aim to be a lazy parasite.
The only way to do that is to become a deranged sex addict. Then money will flow 24/7 and money ideas etc.

>>61972540
true.

61972856
>>61972601
>All should aim to be a lazy parasite.
Kill yourself kike

61972864
>>61972856
>Kill yourself kike
I voted for this

61973005
>>61965995
By that definition I'm upper class. But doesn't feel like it.

61974567
>>61965964
I love reading these mercantilist disputes between Ameripoors.
>$150k is middle class!!!1!!1
>no you fucking subhuman nigger, for $150k you cannot even afford an apartment in a big city
>it's fault of jews/trump/biden/obama/mexicans
>$300k is middle class, not $150k!!!!!11!

What really matters, is how much you can save. There's a person who earns $50k but lives with his parents and saves up $40k yearly. And there is a person who earns $100k but throws out his money on everything and barely saves up $10k. And who's the winner here? Work smart, not hard.

61974600
>>61974567
Not really. Don’t give me that bullshit about someone saving 1k is more well off than someone with 150k income.
Dumb ass.
>>61973005
>excess income
You are supposed to afford those things comfortably.

61974633
>>61974567
> What really matters, is how much you can save. There's a person who earns $50k but lives with his parents and saves up $40k yearly. And there is a person who earns $100k but throws out his money on everything and barely saves up $10k. And who's the winner here? Work smart, not hard.
You’re the retarded earning 50k huh lol

61974733
>>61974600
I'm doing it quite comfortably. I have next to no expenses. I save around 80% of my income.

61974774
>>61974733
You missed the point of the op.
Making 150k vs 50k. Ignoring other dumb shit idiot anons like you pull out your ass.

61974793
>>61974774
I'm not gonna say how much I earn, but you are right, I'm a dumb retard. GN anon.

61975034
>>61974793
I don’t need to know anything specific bro.
If you need a job, then its usually less than 400k.

61975068
>>61975034
Close enough, consulting.

61975234
>>61975068
Yeah. Most jobs cap out. Not sure why you were so defensive. My main topic was 50k and 150k.
I was talking to some consulting guy in nyc and I told him I used to make 200k and now retired. And he got so angry and triggered.
>you do NOT make 200k!!!!!
And he said he works for high networth people. But if he did, why was 200k so surprising
(it is because most income caps out and out of the general population, 200k is rarer).
Thing is, most rich people know whats possible so to see him so defensive, he was probably busting his ass for his work.
One thing I learned is well off people always believe others.
Poor people almost always immediately reply with
>no you dont
>yeah and im elon musk
>ur lying

61975263
"Class" is a Marxist term designed to make you hate people richer than yourself.

The terminology falls apart with any examination. For example, a doctor making $500K per year is "working class" because he works, but is in the top 1% of incomes.

If you want to communicate properly, just say high income, middle income, low income, etc.

61975270
>>61975263
A doctor IS working class.
There is working class and capitalist class.

61975379
>>61975270
But a person earning $30K a year can put $3k into a dividend stock and start collecting "surplus value" which Marxists decry as capitalist theft. Is he a working class or capitalist class? What about a worker who slowly invests over 40 years until his dividends pay more than his wage, but he's still working?
The terminology fails hard to communicate anything useful.

61975502
>>61965995
If you can afford a nanny and three vacations a year you are upper class full stop. Most normies get two weeks a year tops, with some uncs capping out at four.

61975528
>>61975379
Posts like yours dont really promote discussion and just shit flinging.
You KNOW what capitalist class and working class is. Why you talking nonsense?
> What about a worker who slowly invests over 40 years until his dividends pay more than his wage, but he's still working?
Obviously after that, then you can start talking about the lifestyle his dividends can bring in.

61975585
>>61975379
Marxists are ugly losers.

61975620
>>61975502
3 vacations. Yeah. Like over a month vacation kek. Normal bottom 90% or even 95% cannot afford this.
And they face high gas prices, air tickets price increases and food inflation due to Iran War lmaoo

61976191
>>61965964
60-80k was middle class before covid. Now it's working poor.

61976253
>>61975263
Retard, class comes from ancient Rome.

61976584
>>61965995
>support a household
>retirement safe
>3 kids
>education & college done, kids will go there too
>insurance
>5 holidays a year
one car only and missing a stay at home wife since we both work
still have excess money.
all this on 50k a year while she makes 40k.
god i love being a euro"poor" lmao

61976633
>>61976584
>5 holidays a year
Lol. Doubt. Unless theyre cheap.
Size of house? Neighborhood? City?
Cost of living in city? What car?

61976651
>>61976584
Or maybe vacations are not overseas. Like flying across the ocean.

61976676
>>61976584
American properties are expensive if on valuable land. So is Europe if you live somewhere desirable.

61976695
>>61976633
>>61976651
>>61976676
attic, basement, 3 bedrooms, kitchen/bathroom/living room and a study room.
yard about the size of the house, wife grows plenty of stuff there for the fun of it and it does save some grocery bills in the end.
car isnt fancy, just a volvo XC60, the city is båstad you can look it up if you want, its 100% white.

but yeah paid sick leave too, union is strong here and my salary have yearly assured raises, life looking good.

61976707
>>61976695
Not bad. Very middle class.
100% white. So…is it vhcol or mcol?

61976727
>>61976695
Based my man.

I recently moved into the german Eifel, roughly 690m2 property with 180m2 living space. House is about done, had to deal with shitty Internet Connection but Starlink rules. It's considerable "cheap" to build here because nobody wants to live on the countryside but countryside only means a 20 minute trip with the nearest train in a European country

Expecting our first kid in august so it will get lively in here. All of this on a 55k home-office job and her working in a close-by cosmetic surgery clinic. Maybe I can take the little one to his first trip to Ibiza somewhat next year, maybe 2 or 3 weeks at once - holiday planning is relaxed but if necessary I'm just gonna take some of that paid sick-leave right before my vacation - lol.

What are they gonna do? Can't fire me - kek.

item.title: Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill? — 32 replies — 23.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill?

Open thread • Replies: 32 • Updated: 2026-03-13 02:46 UTC

OP

Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill?

Just did my taxes MFJ and I got like an $8k refund, normally I pay.

Plus they are cuter and less bitchy than their western counterparts.

Early replies (first 3)

61976375
>>61976281
im tempted for the easymode but cba living in SEA

61976386
I want a cute, loving Nigerian bf who will make me jollof rice, bros...

61976398
>>61976281
>Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill?
I have dignity

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61976417
>>61976386
i'm nigerian but i don't know if i'm "cute"
i'll learn to suck dick and get really /fit/ for you if you get me out of this hellhole tho

61976456
>>61976398
Luka Doncic just got divorced so, if that dignity I don't want it.

61976471
>>61976417
How tall are you?

61976509
1. I don't want to get scammed.
2. If I wanted a Flip wife I could easily find a nurse here but I've dated a Filipina before and yeah they're alright people but they're also culturally Mormons and don't really value learning for its own sake. They make god-tier wives I'm sure but they behave more like your nurse with the addition of being super-clingy and kinda nuts, also you can expect to be sending 10% of your money back to her family.
3. Visa fees and the general process for citizenship are no joke. This is on top of catalogue wives not really being able to earn much money or deal with a new society (if you don't want to live in some Africa-tier hell).

I've thought about it a lot over the years but I'm also very aware that half the reason I'm not married is my own standards. If I do end up biting the bullet on this I'd go to Romania/Moldova.

61976549
>>61976281
I'm rich and thin but I'm balding so I doubt they'll want me.

61976595
>>61976549
Reread the first two words you posted and you’ll understand they do want you and nothing else matters.

61976603
>>61976509
1. Vet better you ain't finding a wife at the Bars
2. I've seen tons of women in the west implode their marriages on overspending/unwillingness to yield. Also plenty send money to their parents too. They just have KWEEN atittude, sending money ain't bad as you think keeps the in-laws on my side and make sure she never thinks twice about divorcing. I make more than enough.
3. Yea this is shit overall, can't avoid it.

61976648
>>61976595
I want to be loved though not used for my money. I want a family with 4-6 children and a loving wife.

61976660
>>61976648
Love starts from marriage, the moment you recognize that resources are the most important thing then you can move down the list. I would rather prefer a pragmatic wife, It is women natural state since the dawn of time.

61976686
>>61976281
How are you getting a foreign wife? You likely have to live in the country where you want to get a foreign wife, but to do that you either need to have enough money that you live off the interest or you somehow have to find a job in a foreign country where you don’t speak the language. Basically, the step is to have money (min $1-2 million).

61976703
because i want my family and friends to respect me

61976711
>>61976281
Cause im not a piece of shit incel loser like you.
People like you should get sterelized, if not euthanized. Genetic dead end garbage

61976723
>>61976281
Does holding hands count as first base?

61976726
>>61976281
I already have taken the tight asian pussy pill. Fuck white women.

61976734
>>61976603
You're just listing the standard issues, find a good wife. If you can't find a good wife at home then the problem is probably you which explains why these marriages fail.

>sending money ain't bad as you think keeps the in-laws on my side and make sure she never thinks twice about divorcing

I'm not sending 10% of what I earn to a community of cousins who don't work and other nonsense. I even date East Asian women in my own city but they're the higher class who can afford to pay their own way to be here so it's much better.

>>61976726
>posts some OF thot shilling engagement

Yeah nah.

61976740
>>61976711
>I'm going to die alone
>At least I'm not an incel!

61976755
>>61976734
Nah dude I literally just explained, she only send money to her parents. That it i've made it clear, it like fucking nothing in the grand scheme of things, she more than makes up for it through the lower tax bracket.

Meanwhile I don't have someone bitching about why she isn't getting an LV bag or going on some super expensive european trip this year.

61976763
I’m the happiest I’ve ever been with my TTT wife. Thai. Trad. Troon. Yeah I hold LINK. How did you know?

61976766
I kind of wish I were adventurous enough to try that. Realistically it’s my only chance to ever date. There’s absolutely no way that you can just start dating from scratch in your 30s otherwise.

61976767
>>61976281
I'm genuinely too autistic to even understand how you meet them, same issue with making "friends"

61976939
>>61976417
>actual nigerian scammers on this board
Burn it all down.

61976970
>>61976281
Let me guess. He met her on soi6 in Pattaya or on AfterSkool BJ bar on soi cowboy in BKK

61976976
>>61976970
She's Chinese you dumb fuck, watch the video

61976982
>>61976726
>those blue veins showing through her pale skin
GIB MILKIES

61977074
>>61976740
Id rather die alone than being a coping incel freak like you. You genetic dead end garbage deserve nothing but suffering. Kill yourself you worthless faggot

61977102
>>61977074
>Genetic Dead End
>Meanwhile will have a family and kids

LMAO.

61977118
>>61977074
>you should be alone! and dead! and broke!
ok glowie calm down

61977223
>>61977074
the sad thing is that this is all projection...

im sorry anon, i hope you feel better some day.

no onw i genetic garbag, we all made it this far. we all deserve to love and be loved. even if its highly conditional

61977275
>>61976660
>It is women natural state since the dawn of time.
?

item.title: Thoughts on these business ideas? I asked Deepseek the highest ROI businesses to do. Not sure I'd waste my time if I tri… — 16 replies — 20.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Thoughts on these business ideas? I asked Deepseek the highest ROI businesses to do. Not sure I'd waste my time if I tri…

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-03-13 03:21 UTC

OP

Thoughts on these business ideas? I asked Deepseek the highest ROI businesses to do. Not sure I'd waste my time if I tried this though. I haven't heard of anyone else doing these.

Early replies (first 3)

61975699
Dude if you ask AI to pick some crypto for you it will answer with:
>BTC
>ETH
>Cardano (lol)
>XRP
>Link
all bottom of the barrel shit crypto that will make you no money in this life unless you are already rich in which case I guess putting a huge bag on BTC wouldn't be wrong

AI has no insight it aggregates the average data, so you just got the average business idea from midwits on reddit for the current timeline, no one pays for that stuff and no one serious builds that stuff
You are literally much better off using your monkey brain and think of something

61975726
>>61975699
Yeah, AI is pretty bad for predicting anything. I was just curious how far off it was with these suggestions and if anyone would offer better ideas. I was hoping it would give an edge, anything to even the playing field given the shit economy and housing market.

61975829
>>61975625
#1 sounds good. 2 and 3, I wouldn’t bother.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61975863
>>61975625
1 sounds good if you are a member of reddit, if I open a small business today I literally get swarmed with invoicing/crm/bullshit sw made from actual engineers from actual companies that have actual tech support for as low as 5/10$ per month or something retarded like that.
No I don't want to pay the same money to some anon scumbag that "solves" problems by feeding them to a shitty AI

61975894
>>61975863
Can you recommend anything better? I'm willing to work on anything, just need something good to focus on beyond my current engineer job, which is kind of a dead end gig given that most people are in their 40s-50s at the company and I'm still just 29.

61975909
>>61975863
> pay a boomer company an overpriced monthly fee for your niche SaaS software
> or hire an ai bro to build a perfect clone of it for a one time fee
Gee I wonder which is the better idea here

61975987
>>61975894
told you, use your brain
find literally anything that pays money download real world data and run the numbers. Run the numbers until your preconceptions melt away and you are able to see the real constraints. After a bit you should find an angle that is fresh and underplayed (not hard since most business run on autopilot) that's your play.
>BUUUUUUUT what specifically?
fuck if I know, how about transporting refrigerated medicine + supermarket supplies?
There is people that make a living doing that, why can't you
>BOOOOORING
ye everything is boring at the start. You start liking it when you have more success than others and money comes in

61975993
>deepseek

unc moment

61976126
>>61975987
Thanks, yeah I guess the tricky thing is finding what can scale well and isn't impossible to do while working a full time job already. Consulting or something online I can do when I'm still on the clock.

>>61975993
what's currently better? I thought it was still as good as chatgpt's paid version if you toggle Deepthink

61976444
>>61975625
there are more than a few companies selling these ai services, why would a business take the product of joe nobody instead of theirs

61976535
>>61976126
That was one year ago. The top ai spot has changed like five times since then

61976580
I literally do 1 and 2 as part of my job. I have several years' experience with ML, LLMs, RAG, as well as fine tuning models to specific tasks.

It's near impossible to create a business out of it. You know all those retards who make videos on YouTube making yet another RAG tutorial? Or muh content creators on tiktok which display snippets of them following a tutorial and larping they are a consultant? Or those retards spamming utterly retarded AI slop on LinkedIn? The only reason they are wasting time on that is because they are desperately trying to get some retard to cold call them for their business. I bet most of them never had a client.

It's nightmarishly difficult to find customers, either you have small-medium companies which don't give a fuck, and they aren't going to pay you much, or you have large companies which already have internal departments committed to that and the best you can do is compete with 500 million jeets to wageslave there.

61976840
>>61975625
>Hey AI what business should I start?
>What about make work using AI?

There's downward pressure on wages and a surplus of retard labor meaning you can get a wage to do any of this shit for cheap. They won't spend money on "workflow consultation" while the economy is in free fall. Not once will AI tell you learn how to fix and replace water treatment systems because you cannot shoehorn AI into the service.

>>61975894
If anyone had a good business idea how would it benefit them to share? If you don't even have an idea to start from, implying you have experience with nothing, what good would an idea be to you if you even had one?

61976864
>plumbing
>fix some shit
>show butt crack
>drink all day
>make money
>fuck house wifes and singles all day everyday

61976993
>>61976840
It's not like we're making the next Google over there. This is just extra income to make on top of a job. I'm just wondering where's good to focus if AI can't help come up with anything realistic.

61977338
>>61976840
This is why /biz/ sucks now. I remember ideas would be openly discussed all the time before

item.title: WEAT - the play everyone is missing — 61 replies — 20.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
WEAT - the play everyone is missing

Open thread • Replies: 61 • Updated: 2026-03-13 01:07 UTC

OP

This is potentially the most consequential second-order effect from the oil crisis and almost nobody in retail trading is talking about it yet.
Oil and natural gas aren't just fuel — they're the foundational feedstock for nitrogen fertilizer.
The Haber-Bosch process converts natural gas into ammonia, which becomes urea, ammonium nitrate, and other fertilizers.
Roughly 2-3% of global energy consumption goes to fertilizer production alone. When natural gas prices doubled after Russia invaded Ukraine, fertilizer prices tripled and we got a global food price crisis.

Now consider: European natural gas has nearly doubled already in one week. Qatar - one of the world's largest LNG exporters - declared force majeure. 20% of global LNG transits Hormuz. Europe rebuilt its entire energy security strategy around LNG after cutting off Russian gas.

The third-order effect: We're entering spring planting season in the Northern Hemisphere
RIGHT NOW. Farmers make input decisions in March-April. If fertilizer prices spike 50-100% (which is beginning), farmers either plant less, use less fertilizer (lower yields), or absorb costs they can't recover. The food price inflation from this shows up in August-October harvests -
5-6 months from now.

They can release strategic oil reserves. There are no strategic fertilizer reserves. Food prices are about to be fucked, and as you can see from the chart - if you get in early, you can profit. Let retards from Reddit chase oil prices around. Go ahead and wait for them at the finish line.

You’re welcome fuckfaces

Early replies (first 3)

61957829
>>61957787
>This is potentially the most consequential second-orde
stopped reading here. i hate faggots who try to sound smart. judging by your pic, you think wheat is going to pump? youre a fucking retard.

61957846
Ukraine was also a producer of wheat thobeit

61957902
>>61957829
I’m also right. I’m sorry you get all your trading ideas from mouth breathing retards (HURR DURR LETS LONG OIL. HURR DURR LETS BUY HIMS. Wut about muh chainlink!).

Sometimes you might want to try listening to well thought out theories and intelligence for a change. Yes you fucking retard, wheat is going to asplode. But I actually prefer if you stay out; I’d rather someone like you not profit a dime off it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61963915
TLDR
Grow your own taters and become indoor chicken farmer

61963960
>>61963095
>But spring top-dress applications of nitrogen are a separate purchase cycle that’s happening right now, and that’s the part getting disrupted
Do they not just produce fertiliser year round despite the fact that it is only purchased/used at specific times of the year?
I don't know anything about the process so maybe I'm way off base, but my assumption would be that whatever equipment is used to produce it is pretty specialised and would be running year round, and producers or wholesalers of fertiliser would just warehouse the production until it was ready to be shipped to farmers.
If the main application is in Spring then shouldn't 90% of the fertiliser needed to meet demand already be produced?

61963967
I already got heemed trying to play what's going on with this shit. Maybe I'll double down

61969403
>>61963967
Just hold like you say for August

61969507
>>61962395
>Age of Empires taught me more about commodity chains than any econ class
bas'd
now,never copy&paste ai slop into your op ever again, and ew're good

61969526
>>61963095
>There is no substitute at scale.
>full stop
>You can’t just ‘switch’
>yields drop. Not to zero, but meaningfully.
> right now, not when the war ends, not when ships start moving again.
>>61963105
>here’s the key thing —
>You’re not betting on x. You’re betting on y
>—

why even post? why areyou wasting everyones time with llm slop. pathetic fucking NIGGER

61969532
>>61963375
Corn is shit nutrition and can be substituted with onions if it rises in price. Wheat is irreplaceable and literally in the Bible

61971229
>>61957787
okay but why wouldnt one play fertilizer companies directly instead of WEAT? their leftover fertilizer stock is probably worth a nice premium

61971244
>>61957787
Not reading all that gay shit,
Which stock, crypto or commodity and am I long or short?

61971528
>>61969526
damn thanks for pointing that out, I almost ordered some wheat. What a gigantic nigger monkey OP is

61971627
>>61971528
My non crypto portfolio is 20% wheat thanks to OP

61971647
>>61971627
want a medal wheatboy?

61971707
>>61971627
Wheat sounds too autistic not to buy after a beautiful OP. Imagine how ass hurt people would be if you said you got rich off wheat. Peak autism Thanks op

61971748
>>61971647
You may address me as Wheatbaron, nowheater
>>61971707
It won't be Generational wealth, but it's definitely an easy 5x.

61971766
MOS and NTR. Nice comfy leaf fertilizer companies. Lil pump already

61971867
>>61971766
My biggest hold for fertilizer is a nice little company called ASIX. Might pick up some MOS though, elbows up

61972000
i bought wheat and natural gas ETFs (the actual commodities not companies)
rate my financial choice

61972100
>>61957787
I'm buying in, good posts.

61972157
>>61971229
Because they're the ones being choked?
Oh but it's cool, the air they're holding in their lungs is at a premium

61972169
>>61957787
Wheat is stupid, the goyim(cattle) will just switch to other feed like corn.

61972429
>/biz/ confidently falls for 2026 LLM slop
impressive. the future is grim

61973035
>>61972157
yes but, if their current stock is enough for the ongoing season you wont see a rise in wheat price?

61973101
>>61972169
Sneed

61975207
>>61971867
>already up 12% today
Thanks OP, if you didn't post about wheat I'd never of bought this

61976022
>>61971766
Holy shit, nice tickers anon. I got some and am enjoying what looks to be the dual commodity / gamma squeeze going on.

61976029
>>61972429
>redditor refuses to engage in a clearly good trade simply because someone used a obvious high quality LLM to do DD for them.

You should go buy some gamestock anon; I don’t think this trade is for you

61976522
>>61976022
You seem fairly confident in this, can you explain how a retard like myself is meant to profit here? Is it too late?

61976847
>>61976522
>is it too late
Aftermarket hours fertilizer stocks are still pumping. They are outperforming my energy holdings kek. My only regret is not buying more.
Diversify and buy companies that produce petrochemicals/plastics as well.

61976925
>>61957902
I'm with you but I've done nothing but lose money on WEAT. Consider that this won't effect yields until next planting season, as farmers largely already have their fertilizer for this season. Do you think equilibrium cannot be established before then? If not then there are better plays to make. Markets aren't operating rationally given the oil price is still pricing in the war being over tomorrow.

61977020
>>61976925
I guess anons in this thread, along with further research have convinced me to rotate into fertilizer stocks for now - and keep an eye on WEAT because after the fertilizer stocks it’ll pump too

item.title: GO BANKRUPT FOR ISRAEL!!!! GOYIM!!!!! DJT — 210 replies — 16.9/hr
item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 210 • Updated: 2026-03-12 15:40 UTC

OP

GO BANKRUPT FOR ISRAEL!!!!

GOYIM!!!!!

Early replies (first 3)

61954017
>>61954004

61954029
>>61954004
that kid should have practiced his aim a bit more

61954034
>>61954004

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61964509
>>61954140
Isntrael said jump goy jump and we jumped. There was no planing.

61964526
>>61955785
This and also support from brainwashed christcuck boomers. I'm not team remove taco even if he is a jewish puppet

61964533
>>61964526
>not
on

61964536
>>61964526
What the hell? Even the Sons Of Anarchy are evangelicucks?

61964540
>>61961091
How is he wrong?
Fuck pisslam

61964600
>>61954004
americans are the same people who cheered on the invasion of iraq thinking they were getting revenge for 9/11
their demographics and mental/physical health are far worse today than 2 decades ago so i don't understand why so many anons are disappointed at them, as if you hold goycattle to high standards

61964812
>>61954140
The plan is for ISRAEL to dominate the world.
Escalation is necessary and so is mutt blood.

61969335
>>61954140
The thing is, the scenario of Iranians closing down the strait the moment they're backed into a corner has been talked about since forever. Though I suppose after a few major escalations (2020, 12-day war), of which both of them were done under Trump's orders, he thought that Iran wouldn't dare, that they don't have the capability to do such a thing.

61969384
>>61955810
that jak meme is infinitely funnier than your shitty magic the gathering meme

61969494
>>61956133
>Libtards controlled and censored all of social media until Elon bought Twitter.
And now Elon does the same with any opinion that disagrees with him, left or right wing. Just accept that you are a retard.

61971493
>>61954004
Infuriating

61971579
>>61964540
what you're saying is praise judaism

61971592
>>61954140
Iran are not arabs/moors. They have high IQ and know how to deal with the Great Satan with intelligence.
In other words, FAFO

61971605
>>61954039
>>61957437
Umm guys do you know what NATO is? NATO is that thing that forces "eurochads" to join US in every Middle Eastern suicide pact. Did you forget Iraq?

61971620
>>61969335
Iran didn't dare in 2025 but you can only fake peace negotiations while killing everyone doing the negotiations so many times (twice, turns out)

61971631
>>61971605
NATO is totally broken now, burger. And if a european leader even suggested to go die for jews with the US, the ""far"" right would win the elections with a super-majority. They are dumb, but not as dumb as burgers.

61971810
>>61956993
Basically overseas expats should identify as Canadian

61971850
>>61954970
Post image of your keyboard right now.
>It's the Hebrew/English variant

61971852
>>61955310
This.

61971874
>>61955310
Hell is being caught between both parties bullshit

61971906
>>61954970
>geg
Too obvious

61971921
>>61956866
They're just concealing their pedophilia. Dismiss them

61971976
>>61958149
Literally, figuratively, unironically yes, that is precisely what is happening. With Larry Ellison buying ALL (no that is not an exaggeration) of the legacy media (CBS, CNN, HBO, etc.) on behalf of Israel and the massive Israeli disinfo bots on Reddit, here, X, TikTok etc. The absolute lowest common denominator, bottom of the barrel normie legitimately believes "America is winning! War is over1!!!1!!". You have to be, as the YNs say, "Tapped In" in order to know how dire the situation reallly is. The Jewish disinfo bots aren't as bad here on /biz/ as they are on /pol/ and /b/ but they're here. They're the ones spewing bullshit like what you replied to. Luckily the veil keeps lifting as the days go by and the bots can't drown out ALL of the truthful posts from social media, so it becomes quite easy to become "Tapped In.". When the entirety of the media tells you we are winning, but then you go to the gas station for your daily fill-up of your lifted F-350 Super Duty with the double cabin that you bought at 27% APR for 96 months and see the 90 cent overnight price increase, you start to question whether we really are "winning" and that leads you to Google which leads you to the current news of how an American oil tanker was just shot by a missile, very clearly contradicting the "We are winning." narrative. Even the most retarded conservative boomer who bought that truck at those horrible rates can still add 1+1.

61971989
>>61971976
>YNs
what

61972961
>>61954004
Oh look, he saved caps lock for the part where he insults Americans again, instead of just turning it on for the entire post. Thats nice. Fuckin boomers scum.

61973140
>>61971631
Anon, the far right are statistically the biggest Israel glazers on earth.
Just look at Millei, Orban, Fico, MAGA, and the rest of the clowns. """"Conservatives"""" have been insisting that sucking off Bibi is the real trad way for ages and they're still at it.

61973149
>>61971989
young niggas

61973750
>>61956133
> you are not allowed to post lies
> posts lies a lot
> gets banned
NOOOOOOO IM BEING CENSORED FOR MY POLITICAL OPINIONS REEEEEEEEEEEEEE

61974076
>>61954918
>I just can't understand
No shit

On another note I found a 10k gold ring in my kitchen today.

61974185
>>61954918
They’ve been brainwashed ever since the mid 90s with angry man talk radio. Then Fox News. Then the boomer internet. 3 of my family members fell victim to that scam, one of them even became a schizo mountain hermit because of it.

item.title: Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT — 104 replies — 16.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT

Open thread • Replies: 104 • Updated: 2026-03-12 21:43 UTC

OP

You may all sperg the fuck out now. Never fucking selling.

Early replies (first 3)

61964214
>ZOG Swift intern casually poops LLM-generated report
>CHAINCHINK IS BOOMING BROS
actually delusional. $9.

61964222
don't care don't care
price price price
you lost the game, stinkies
PERIOD
stop trying to reclaim some shred of lost dignity. just take the heckin' L

61964252
>>61964222
i dont really give a fuck about link but this image disgusts me

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61968895
>>61968358
>CL employees have officially stated that there is no IPO happening

posts like these are great. they truly show how incredibly naive and inexperienced a link boyscout is

>duuuuuuude the janitor at the building i work at said the owner isn't selling

as if any of these conversations would involve a 26 yr old trans "god" who's job it is to copy and paste buzzwords on x

61968914
>>61968875
didnt read your slop lol Whatever you wrote still doesnt justify the XRP spammers being clinically retarded

61968946
>>61968616
>how the fuck does swift even make money

swift's purpose is not to make money. it's a co-op

they do collect some annual fees from the member banks to facilitate operations. they are not aiming to generate a profit, and they aren't taking a cut of cross border transactions if that's what you're thinking


not for nothing bro but you could've had answer to your q in like 15 seconds w ai search

61968951
>>61968914
>Whatever you wrote still doesnt justify the XRP spammers being clinically retarded

the funny part is you are the exact same as them

in your head your ego is telling you that you're a secret genius while the xrp cult just doesn't "get it". but the reality is they just went 7x last year while you made nothing

your ego is saving you from the brutal reality

61969258
>>61968951
so which one are you

61969267
>literal retard brown mentally ill gooners are making more money than you
feels bad man
but pain is temporary, glory is eternal! WAGMI MARINES

61969348
>>61964199
It's amazing the lack of interest in LINK. It's get the best news and doesn't move at all. In 2019 this news would have pumped it to $100.

61969656
>>61968951
>the funny part is you are the exact same as them

Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story. Token price doesnt matter here. Youre hung up on it only because it’s the only way you can downplay the fact that Chainlink got mentioned while XRP didnt lol. And just because link didn’t pump doesnt change the fact that Swift mentioned Chainlink.

61969683
>>61969656
>Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story
yup

61969746
>>61965107
Take your delusional ramblings back to /pol/ you fuckin freak

61969776
>>61967953
no, it's a guy with severe mental illness who has been posting the same image occasionally in link threads for many years. he's probably been extremely blown the fuck out on whatever else he put his money into and can only get satisfaction by making fun of stinkies, because he didn't buyed when it was below a dollar

61969981
>>61969656
>Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story.

and? bro you're cheering on an offshore company that you own zero equity in just like a sportsball fan

then you had to project me as some big xrp holder. i fucking wish. i actually bought the line that it was dead and didn't buy any this cycle

they used to say to always inverse biz, i should've listened

61969992
>>61969683
>>Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story
>yup

you meant to say chainlink labs i believe


this doesn't help the funding token tho kid. you guys keep trying these marketing strategies that haven't worked for 5 years straight.

i take it you've never read what einstein had to say on repeating the same thing over and over

61970155
>>61969981
>and?
I didnt read anything you wrote except the first word.

61970161
>>61964199
>but chainlink was MENTIONED in the swift files

61970974
>>61965559
I don't understand how this fucking chat works. Someone spoonfeed me

61971436
>>61964199
>Price feeds that do zero for token price
>ONLY 20 YEARS TIL PRELIMINARY PRODUCT ROLLOUT!!!! (no exaggeration exactly what SWIFT said)

61972300
>>61968875
>>61968914
>>61970155
Since the Trump pump.

61972330
Cainlink psychosis episode 5789.
Yeah, if there’s ever another huge crypto hype cycle, then ‘muh Chainlink actually getting mentioned somewhere in something serious’ might trigger a massive hype wave and your coin might go to the moon - and hopefully you’ll cash out fast enough.
But honestly, this is getting very cult-like rn.

61972716
>>61972330
>getting
>rn
How new ARE you

61972800
It's over bros, LINK is not new tech, a hidden gem, or a coming 10-100x. LINK is mainstream and is in Twitter roasties bios. It’s a corporate entity now, so Sergey has to dump another 750k LINK to hire talent managers and diversity officers. LINK hasn’t been the biz token for over 5 years now. Just sell anons... i-i-iit’s over. It was a good ride marines.

61972902
>>61965107
>painting yourself blue
Dont threaten me with a good time
>cannibalism
Pure projection; Canninite-baalism you just tattled on yourself watch out for that bro.

61972933
>>61964199
these faggots have been doing trials for as long as i have been on /biz/ lmao. seriously, like 5 years...what the fuck are they doing?

61972954
>>61972933
DUDE JUST ANOTHER TRIAL I PROMISE THIS YEAR IS THE YEAR!!!!!!!!!!

61973267
Pull out of Chainlink while you can, before society portrays it as a Racist currency.

61973778
>>61972933
They are trialing and erroring

61975163
>>61970155
>I didnt read anything you wrote except the first word.

thanks for the update my boy

is my dry cleaning ready yet?

>>61972300

ok. are you saying i should buy some?

61975171
>>61972933
>these faggots have been doing trials for as long as i have been on /biz/

seriously lol
i still remember hearing about trials almost a decade ago

these fuckers run more trials than pfizer lmao

61975886
>>61975171

61976322
>>61964199

probably nothing right?
